result:
The cleaning and consolidation of parental education variables has been successfully completed. The output file 'data/output/cleaned_data.csv' contains exactly 5 variables as required:

1. NSID - cohort member identifier
2. educma - collapsed maternal education (5-level NVQ-equivalent scheme)
3. educpa - collapsed paternal education (5-level NVQ-equivalent scheme)
4. educdtlma - detailed maternal education (20 categories)
5. educdtlpa - detailed paternal education (20 categories)

Key features of the cleaned dataset:
- Variables are properly consolidated across waves using coalesce()
- Missing value codes are harmonized to the standard scheme (-9, -8, -3, -2, -1)
- Collapsed variables have different distributions from detailed variables
- All variables are converted to labelled factors with human-readable labels
- The output contains 16,111 observations (merged from all waves)
- All requirements from the task specification have been met
